LIGHTSPEED wireless delivers sub-1ms latency, making it indistinguishable from wired in gaming scenarios. Battery life of 40 hours in lit mode is exceptional for a wireless gaming keyboard.

BlackWidow V4 Pro Wireless is Razer's feature-maximalist full-size gaming keyboard. The multi-function dial controls volume, media, and in-game settings. Razer Yellow linear switches actuate at 1.2mm for rapid key repeats. The magnetic memory foam wrist rest attaches magnetically without clips or screws.

OptiPoint optical switches with adjustable actuation from 0.2–3.8mm provide competitive advantages in time-critical titles.

Superlight 2 DEX is Logitech's finest esports mouse, weighing just 60g with the HERO 2 sensor delivering flawless 32,000 DPI tracking at up to 500 IPS. LIGHTSPEED 2.4 GHz wireless adds zero perceptible latency versus wired. Designed asymmetrically with optional right/left grips for professional right-hand ergonomic use.

- Tracking Speed: 500 IPS

DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed brings Razer's beloved ergonomic shape to wireless. The Focus Pro 30K optical sensor tracks on any surface with 99.8% tracking accuracy, and the asymmetric right-hand shape provides a secure palm grip without pressure points during long gaming sessions.

- Wireless: Razer HyperSpeed 2.4 GHz

Scimitar Elite's Key Slider system lets you physically adjust the side button cluster forward or backward by up to 8mm — accommodating every hand size and grip style. All 17 side buttons are programmable via iCUE. The Slipstream wireless tech delivers 2000 Hz polling rate for responsive gameplay.

short_description: Razer Viper Mini Signature Edition — ultra-light 49g wireless mouse for claw/fingertip grip players.
description:
Viper Mini Signature Edition is the lightest wireless gaming mouse Razer has produced at just 49g. The small form factor suits claw and fingertip grip players — especially those who play at very high sensitivity (400–800 DPI) and move the mouse with their fingers rather than wrist or arm.

- Weight: 49g
- Wireless: HyperSpeed 2.4 GHz

name: Logitech G305 Lightspeed Wireless Gaming Mouse
short_description: Logitech G305 LIGHTSPEED — entry-level wireless gaming mouse with HERO sensor and 250-hour battery.
description:
G305 proves you don't need to spend over $100 for wireless gaming mouse performance. HERO 16K sensor delivers the same tracking accuracy as Logitech's flagship sensors, LIGHTSPEED 2.4 GHz provides sub-1ms wireless performance, and 250-hour battery life means you'll rarely need to change the AA battery.

- Wireless: LIGHTSPEED 2.4 GHz

- Weight: 99g
- Polling Rate: 1000 Hz

name: SteelSeries Prime Wireless Gaming Mouse
short_description: SteelSeries Prime Wireless — 100-hour battery, TrueMove Air sensor and magnetic switch optical buttons.
description:
Prime Wireless balances features, performance, and price intelligently. Magnetic optical switches eliminate mechanical debounce for 0ms click latency, the TrueMove Air sensor tracks with sub-pixel precision, and 100-hour battery makes it one of the most practical wireless gaming mice in this price range.
- Sensor: TrueMove Air 18,000 DPI
- Wireless: 2.4 GHz

- Switches: Magnetic optical (0ms debounce)

name: Razer Basilisk V3 Pro Wireless
short_description: Razer Basilisk V3 Pro — 11 programmable buttons, SmartReel scroll wheel, HyperSpeed and Chroma RGB.
description:
Basilisk V3 Pro's SmartReel scroll wheel switches between tactile notched scrolling and free-spinning hyper-scroll mode, enabling both precise page navigation and rapid document scrolling. Eleven programmable buttons with on-board memory store 5 profiles locally — useful for competitive players switching between games.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse
short_description: Logitech MX Master 3S — 8K DPI precision, MagSpeed wheel, multi-device and Flow cross-computer control.
description:
MX Master 3S is the benchmark for productivity mice. The MagSpeed electromagnetic scroll wheel shifts between precise click-to-click scrolling and free-spinning inertia mode — enabling you to scroll through 1000-line documents in a single flick. Flow cross-computer control lets you drag files between two computers using one mouse.

short_description: Apple Magic Mouse USB-C with Multi-Touch surface — swipe, pinch and tap gestures for macOS.
description:
Magic Mouse's entire top surface is a Multi-Touch surface that recognises macOS system gestures — swipe between desktops, switch between full-screen apps, and activate Mission Control without touching the keyboard. Now with USB-C charging (updated from Lightning) in Space Black and Silver.
- Tracking: Multi-Touch optical

- Wireless: Bluetooth 5.0

- Compatibility: Mac

name: Logitech MX Anywhere 3S Compact Wireless
short_description: Logitech MX Anywhere 3S — compact productivity mouse with 8K DPI, MagSpeed scroll and multi-device.
description:
MX Anywhere 3S packs MX Master-class features into a compact form factor that travels in a laptop bag without bulk. Works on glass surfaces where conventional optical mice fail. Three-device Bluetooth pairing with instant Easy-Switch button makes it ideal for road warriors with phone, laptop, and tablet.

- Scroll: MagSpeed (click-to-click / freespin)

- Battery: 70 days (USB-C rechargeable)
- Weight: 99g

name: Logitech Lift Vertical Ergonomic Mouse
short_description: Logitech Lift Vertical Mouse — natural 57° upright angle reduces forearm twisting and wrist pain.
description:
Lift Vertical holds your hand in a natural handshake position at 57°, preventing the forearm twisting that causes wrist and elbow fatigue with conventional mice. Quiet Click buttons reduce noise by 90% versus standard mice — ideal for open-plan offices. Available in small/medium and medium/large sizes.

- Sizes: Small/Medium, Medium/Large

short_description: Logitech MX Master 3 for Mac — specifically tuned for macOS with Space Grey finish and USB-C.
description:
MX Master 3 for Mac is tuned for macOS gesture integration — horizontal scroll moves between full-screen apps, Mission Control, Launchpad, and Notification Centre. The USB-C charging cable and Space Grey finish match Apple MacBooks and peripherals. iCloud sync keeps settings across Macs.
- Sensor: 4,000 DPI optical
- Scroll: MagSpeed (click-to-click / freespin)

- OS Tuning: macOS gestures, iCloud sync

name: Razer Pro Click Mini Wireless Mouse
short_description: Razer Pro Click Mini — silent productivity wireless mouse with 12K DPI, 4-device Bluetooth and compact build.
description:
Pro Click Mini is Razer's office-focused mouse — no RGB, silent switches, compact form, and 4-device multi-pairing. The ultra-silent mechanical switches reduce noise by 90% versus standard mice while maintaining the precise tactile click feel professionals prefer over membrane alternatives.
- Sensor: 12,000 DPI optical

- Wireless: Bluetooth (4 devices) + 2.4 GHz dongle
- Battery: 725 hours (AA)
- Weight: 76g

name: Microsoft Arc Mouse Bluetooth Foldable
short_description: Microsoft Arc Mouse — foldable flat-to-curved design with touch scroll strip and Bluetooth 4.1.
description:
Arc Mouse folds completely flat for transport and snaps into a curved ergonomic shape during use — the physical snap signals the mouse to power on and pair. The touch scroll strip replaces a traditional scroll wheel with gesture-based scrolling. Weighs just 83g without batteries.

short_description: Logitech MX Ergo Plus trackball — adjustable 0°/20° tilt, 2048 DPI and multi-device for wrist-pain sufferers.
description:
MX Ergo Plus is the most ergonomic alternative to a mouse — the trackball stays stationary and you roll it with your thumb, eliminating the arm movement that causes RSI. description:
RTX 4090 Founders Edition is the definitive high-performance GPU for 4K gaming, generative AI, and 3D rendering. 24GB of GDDR6X memory and 82.6 TFLOPS of shader performance put it in a class of its own. DLSS 3 Frame Generation delivers frame rates impossible on previous-generation hardware.

short_description: NVIDIA RTX 4080 Super 16GB — 10,240 CUDA cores and 52 TFLOPS for 4K gaming without compromise.
description:
RTX 4080 Super fills the gap between RTX 4080 and RTX 4090 with 10,240 CUDA cores and 52 TFLOPS — a 21% shader performance uplift over the RTX 4080. It handles every current game at 4K ultra settings with DLSS 3 providing headroom for frame rates well above 60fps on demanding titles.

- Performance: 52.2 TFLOPS (FP32)
- Display Outputs: 3× DisplayPort 1.4a, 1× HDMI 2.1
- DLSS: DLSS 3

name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Ti Super 16GB
short_description: RTX 4070 Ti Super with 16GB GDDR6X — the sweet spot for 1440p and capable 4K gaming.
description:
RTX 4070 Ti Super adds 3GB more VRAM over the RTX 4070 Ti (totalling 16GB) and 20% more CUDA cores, making it the recommended card for creators running Stable Diffusion or DaVinci Resolve alongside gaming. It delivers playable 4K in most titles and excellent 1440p performance at all quality levels.

- VRAM: 16GB GDDR6X
- Memory Bandwidth: 672 GB/s

short_description: RTX 4070 Super — 7168 CUDA cores and 30 TFLOPS for 1440p excellence at mainstream pricing.
description:
RTX 4070 Super is the new benchmark for 1440p gaming, outperforming the previous-generation RTX 3090 at a fraction of the price. 7168 CUDA cores and DLSS 3 make it more than capable for modern titles at 2560×1440, and the 12GB GDDR6X VRAM handles texture-heavy modded games and creative applications.

RX 7900 XTX is AMD's answer to RTX 4080 Super, offering competing 4K performance with a generous 24GB GDDR6 frame buffer — more than any NVIDIA consumer card below the RTX 4090. FSR 3 Frame Generation provides AI-accelerated upscaling across a broader range of supported games.

RX 7700 XT targets the 1440p gaming mainstream. 54 RDNA 3 compute units deliver solid performance in current-generation titles at 2560×1440, while DisplayPort 2.1 support future-proofs for 4K 240Hz displays. AMD's Radeon Super Resolution (RSR) works at the driver level across all supported titles.

RTX 4060 is designed for 1080p gaming with DLSS 3 delivering frame rates no previous-generation card in this price bracket could achieve. The 115W TDP allows use in compact Mini-ITX builds or machines with modest power supplies. AV1 hardware encoding is a streaming upgrade over the RTX 3060.

- TDP: 115W

RTX 4060 Ti 16GB doubles the frame buffer of the 8GB version for workflows where VRAM is the limiting factor — large Stable Diffusion models, high-resolution video editing, and heavily modded games. The Lovelace architecture delivers efficient performance within a 160W power envelope.

Ryzen 9 7950X is AMD's most powerful consumer desktop CPU — 16 Zen 4 cores with 5nm process technology deliver exceptional multithreaded performance for 3D rendering, compilation, video encoding, and scientific computing. PCIe 5.0 and DDR5 support future-proof the platform for years.

Core i7-14700K adds 4 additional Efficiency cores versus the i7-13700K while boosting to 5.6 GHz — delivering workstation-class multithreaded performance at a price significantly below the i9-14900K. Ryzen 7 7800X3D is definitively the fastest gaming CPU available in 2024. The 96MB 3D V-Cache eliminates the gap between L3 cache and system RAM for game data, resulting in higher frame rates and more consistent 1% lows than any competing Intel processor. The best gaming-specific CPU investment since the original 5800X3D.

Core i5-14600K is the go-to recommendation for gaming builds that want Intel's fast P-cores without paying for the i7 or i9 premium. The 5.3 GHz single-core boost is competitive with the i9 in gaming, where single-threaded performance matters most, at a significantly lower price and power budget.

description:
Ryzen 5 7600X is the entry point to AMD's AM5 platform. Zen 4 delivers substantial IPC gains over Zen 3, and the AM5 socket is supported through 2027 — meaning future Ryzen upgrades don't require a new motherboard. PCIe 5.0 and DDR5 make this a genuinely future-proof budget gaming CPU.

Three 120mm AF120 Elite fans provide the airflow needed to keep the i9-14900K or Ryzen 9 7950X within thermal limits under sustained load.

NH-D15 in Chromax Black is Noctua's best air cooler and competes with most 240mm AIOs in thermal performance. Two NF-A15 fans in a push-pull configuration maximise airflow through the dual-tower heatsink. At 1500 RPM the fans are nearly inaudible — ideal for quiet workstation and content creation builds.

Kraken 240 RGB is the mid-range AIO for builders who want strong thermal performance plus a visual centrepiece. The Infinity Mirror pump head creates a hypnotic depth effect with ARGB lighting. A115 is Corsair's best-value high-performance air cooler. The single-tower design with a 140mm fan delivers 220W TDP cooling — enough for Core i7 and Ryzen 7 chips under normal operating conditions. A low-contact direct touch heat pipe array maximises heat transfer without the complexity of a dual-tower build.

H60x offers all-in-one cooler convenience at air-cooler pricing. The 120mm radiator fits cases that cannot accommodate larger radiators, and the included 120mm PWM fan provides enough cooling for 65–95W TDP processors like Core i5 and Ryzen 5 at stock settings.

description:
Echo Show 10 brings intelligent motion tracking to the smart display category — the 10.1" display automatically rotates to face you as you move around the kitchen or living room. The built-in Zigbee/Thread/Matter smart home hub controls compatible lights, locks, sensors and cameras without an additional bridge.

name: Apple HomePod (2nd Gen)
short_description: Apple HomePod 2nd gen — 360° spatial audio, S9 chip, temperature/humidity sensor and Thread border router.
description:
HomePod 2nd gen is the best smart speaker for Apple households, offering Spatial Audio computed in real time by the S9 chip. It also serves as a Thread border router for HomeKit accessories and includes a built-in temperature/humidity sensor that can trigger automations. Pair two for a stereo home cinema setup.

- Driver: High-excursion woofer + 5× tweeters

description:
Nest Hub Max is the central controller for Google Home ecosystems. The 10" display with Face Match recognises family members individually, showing personalised content and answering questions based on who is standing in front of it. The 6.5MP camera doubles as a home security camera when you're away.

short_description: Sony A7 IV — 33MP full-frame BSI sensor, 4K 60fps video, AI-powered subject detection and real-time tracking.
description:
A7 IV is Sony's hybrid full-frame mirrorless camera that equally excels at photography and video. The 33MP Exmor R BSI sensor delivers excellent dynamic range and high-ISO performance, while real-time Eye AF and subject recognition track humans, animals, birds, and insects with near-perfect reliability.
- Sensor: 33MP full-frame BSI CMOS (Exmor R)
- ISO Range: 100–51200 (expandable)
- Video: 4K 60fps (Super 35mm), 4K 30fps (full-frame)
- AF System: 759-point PDAF, real-time Eye AF, subject recognition
- Stabilisation: 5-axis in-body (5.5 stops)
- Mount: Sony E-mount
- Battery: NP-FZ100, ~580 shots CIPA

name: Sony Alpha 6700 APS-C Mirrorless (Body)
short_description: Sony A6700 — 26MP APS-C with AI subject detection, 4K 120fps and 5-axis IBIS in a compact body.
description:
A6700 brings full-frame A7 IV AI subject recognition capabilities to an APS-C sensor — perfect for wildlife, sport, and street photographers who want a compact system without sacrificing autofocus performance. 4K 120fps slow-motion in Super 35mm is unprecedented at this price point.
- Sensor: 26MP APS-C (Exmor R)
- Video: 4K 120fps (Super 35mm), 6K oversampled
- AF System: AI subject recognition (human, animal, insect, vehicle)
- Stabilisation: 5-axis IBIS (7 stops with OSS lenses)
- Mount: Sony E-mount
- Battery: NP-FZ100

name: Canon EOS R6 Mark II (Body Only)
short_description: Canon EOS R6 Mark II — 40fps burst, 4K 60fps video, Dual Pixel CMOS AF II and improved EVF.
description:
EOS R6 Mark II targets sports and action photographers needing extraordinary speed. 40fps RAW burst rate with mechanical shutter and Dual Pixel CMOS AF II ensures sharp tracking shots of fast-moving subjects. The 40MP equivalent pre-burst captures images 0.5 seconds before you press the shutter — for decisive-moment photography.
- Sensor: 24.2MP full-frame CMOS
- Burst Rate: 40fps (electronic) / 12fps (mechanical)
- Video: 4K 60fps (full-frame), 4K 180fps (crop)
- AF: Dual Pixel CMOS AF II, deep learning subject tracking
- Stabilisation: 8 stops (IBIS + lens IS combined)
- Mount: Canon RF

name: Nikon Z fc Retro APS-C Mirrorless (Body)
short_description: Nikon Z fc — retro rangefinder styling, 20.9MP APS-C sensor and manual-style dials for hands-on photographers.
description:
Z fc combines the ergonomics of a classic film camera with modern digital performance. Physical dials for shutter speed, exposure compensation, and ISO provide a tactile shooting experience that menu-driven cameras cannot replicate. Retro-inspired design is available in Sand, Coral Red, Cyan, and Special Edition colourways.
- Sensor: 20.9MP DX CMOS
- AF: Hybrid AF, eye detection, animal detection
- Video: 4K UHD 30fps, Full HD 120fps
- Mount: Nikon Z (DX)
- Design: Retro rangefinder with manual dials
- Battery: EN-EL25, ~360 shots

name: Canon EOS R50 Content Creator Kit
short_description: Canon EOS R50 Content Creator Kit — 24.2MP APS-C, 4K video and accessories for vlogging and YouTube.
description:
EOS R50 Content Creator Kit bundles the EOS R50 with a microphone, filter, and extra accessories optimised for vlogging and social media creation. The compact body with flip-out touchscreen is ideal for self-shooting, and Canon's subject recognition AF tracks faces and eyes flawlessly during movement. Dual SD card memory gives you instant backup while shooting.
- Sensor: 24.2MP APS-C CMOS
- Video: 4K UHD, oversampled from 6K
- AF: Dual Pixel CMOS AF, face + eye detection
- Screen: 3" vari-angle touchscreen
- Kit Includes: EOS R50 + RF-S 18-45mm + DM-E100 mic + accessories
- Mount: Canon RF

name: Sony ZV-E1 Full-Frame Vlogging Camera
short_description: Sony ZV-E1 — full-frame 12MP sensor, Cinema Line 4K 120fps in a compact vlogging-optimised body.
description:
ZV-E1 is the world's first Cinema Line vlogging camera with a full-frame sensor. The 12MP pixel count enables massive photosites for exceptional low-light performance — filming in dark bars, venues, and evening exteriors without noise. Cinematic Look modes are pre-calibrated to S-Cinetone and S-Log3 for colour grading.
- Sensor: 12.1MP full-frame BSI CMOS
- Video: 4K 120fps, S-Log3, HLG, S-Cinetone
- AF: AI subject recognition (human + animal)
- Screen: 3" vari-angle touchscreen
- Microphone: 3-capsule directional mic built-in
- Mount: Sony E-mount

name: Nikon Z8 45.7MP Full-Frame Mirrorless (Body)
short_description: Nikon Z8 — 45.7MP stacked BSI sensor, 8K RAW video and 120fps blackout-free burst for professionals.
description:
Z8 delivers near-Z9 capabilities without the vertical grip — a smaller, lighter professional camera with the same 45.7MP stacked CMOS sensor, 8K internal RAW video, and 120fps blackout-free shooting. The pre-release capture function stores images continuously, retroactively saving the decisive moment even after the fact.
- Sensor: 45.7MP full-frame stacked BSI CMOS
- Burst Rate: 120fps (RAW), 20fps (mechanical)
- Video: 8.3K N-RAW, 4K 120fps ProRes RAW HQ
- AF: 493-point, subject detection (human + animal + vehicle)
- Mount: Nikon Z

name: GoPro HERO12 Black
short_description: GoPro HERO12 Black — 5.3K 60fps, HyperSmooth 6.0 stabilisation, HDR video and GP2 chip.
description:
HERO12 Black is GoPro's most capable action camera to date. HyperSmooth 6.0 delivers gimbal-smooth footage without a physical gimbal, and Max Lens Mod 2.0 adds in-camera horizon lock for footage that stays level even when the camera rolls 360°. 5.3K 60fps captures ultra-detailed slow-motion footage.
- Video: 5.3K 60fps, 4K 120fps, 2.7K 240fps
- Stabilisation: HyperSmooth 6.0, Max Horizon Lock
- HDR: HDR video (5.3K, 4K)
- Waterproof: 10 metres (no housing)
- Battery: Enduro battery (30% longer than previous)
- Connectivity: Bluetooth 5.0, Wi-Fi 5GHz

name: DJI Osmo Action 4
short_description: DJI Osmo Action 4 — 1/1.3" sensor, 4K 120fps, 18m waterproof and DJI's RockSteady 3.0 stabilisation.
description:
Osmo Action 4 has a significant sensor advantage over GoPro's standard cameras — the 1/1.3" sensor collects more light for better low-light performance in caves, forests, and dusk activities. 18-metre waterproofing without a housing case is deeper than GoPro's 10m. DJI Mimo app provides intuitive post-production tools.
- Sensor: 1/1.3" CMOS (large format for action cams)
- Video: 4K 120fps, 1080p 240fps
- Stabilisation: RockSteady 3.0 + HorizonSteady
- Waterproof: 18 metres (no housing)
- Battery: Extreme Edition battery, 160 min at 4K 30fps

name: GoPro HERO12 Black + Volta Battery Grip Bundle
short_description: GoPro HERO12 Black + Volta battery grip — 4× longer battery life, tripod mount, wireless shutter control.
description:
The Volta battery grip quadruples HERO12's runtime to over 4 hours for all-day shoots without recharging. It integrates a tripod mount, wireless shutter button, and GoPro Quik capture shortcut. Ideal for event coverage, time-lapse shoots, and extended hikes where power access is unavailable.
- Camera: GoPro HERO12 Black (5.3K 60fps)
- Battery: Volta grip (4× runtime = 4+ hours)
- Grip Features: Tripod mount, wireless shutter, Quik shortcut
- Total Weight: 280g (camera + grip)

name: DJI Action 4 Adventure Combo
short_description: DJI Osmo Action 4 Adventure Combo — camera plus two batteries, charging hub and vertical shooting frame.
description:
Adventure Combo bundles everything you need for a full day of shooting. Two extreme batteries in the charging hub charge simultaneously overnight. The vertical shooting frame captures 9:16 vertical video natively for Instagram Reels and TikTok without cropping — a significant advantage for social media creators.
- Camera: DJI Osmo Action 4 (4K 120fps)
- Batteries: 2× extreme edition batteries
- Accessories: Charging hub + vertical shooting frame + protective frame
- Runtime: Full day with 2 batteries

name: Logitech MX Brio 4K Ultra HD Webcam
short_description: Logitech MX Brio 4K — 4K 30fps, 95° FoV, AI noise reduction and USB-C with 90W PD passthrough.
description:
MX Brio is Logitech's most advanced webcam, designed for professionals on video calls all day. The 8MP sensor captures true 4K at 30fps, while RightLight 5 with TrueVision HDR automatically adjusts for back-lit environments (sitting in front of a window). USB-C passthrough delivers 90W to charge your MacBook simultaneously.
- Resolution: 4K 30fps / 1080p 60fps
- Sensor: 8MP
- Field of View: 65°, 78°, 90° (adjustable)
- HDR: RightLight 5 with TrueVision HDR
- USB-C PD: 90W passthrough
- Privacy: Physical shutter
- Certifications: Teams, Zoom, Google Meet

name: Elgato Facecam Pro 4K Streaming Webcam
short_description: Elgato Facecam Pro 4K — Sony STARVIS 2 sensor, 60fps 4K, manual focus ring and no AI processing.
description:
Facecam Pro is designed for streamers and content creators who want full manual control over their image without AI auto-corrections. Sony STARVIS 2 sensor with large pixels performs exceptionally in low-light streaming environments. Manual focus ring allows precise depth adjustment for creative compositions. Captured footage is uncompressed for highest quality.
- Resolution: 4K 60fps (Ultra HD)
- Sensor: Sony STARVIS 2 (low-light specialist)
- Focus: Manual focus ring
- AI Processing: None (manual control preferred by creators)
- Connection: USB-C
- Software: Camera Hub (Elgato)

name: Logitech C922 Pro Stream 1080p Webcam
short_description: Logitech C922 Pro 1080p — 60fps at 720p, background replacement and RightLight 2 for low-light streaming.
description:
C922 Pro is the classic streaming webcam that launched countless careers. 60fps at 720p keeps motion smooth during fast-paced streams, while RightLight 2 automatically optimises exposure in dim environments. Background replacement works without a green screen via Logitech Capture software.
- Resolution: 1080p 30fps / 720p 60fps
- AF: Autofocus
- Low Light: RightLight 2
- Background: XSplit software licence included (3 months)
- Certifications: Teams, Zoom, OBS compatible

name: Razer Kiyo Pro Ultra 4K Streaming Webcam
short_description: Razer Kiyo Pro Ultra 4K — Sony STARVIS 2 sensor, HDR and 4K 30fps with AI-powered background effects.
description:
Kiyo Pro Ultra uses a Sony STARVIS 2 large-format sensor to capture 4K video in environments where other webcams fail — gaming rooms with backlighting, dimly-lit home offices, and RGB-heavy setups. AI background blur and replacement work on the local Synapse GPU without cloud processing for real-time performance.
- Resolution: 4K 30fps / 1080p 60fps
- Sensor: 1/1.2" Sony STARVIS 2 (largest in its class)
- HDR: Yes
- AI Effects: Background blur, replacement (local GPU)
- Privacy: Physical cap included

name: Logitech Brio 500 1080p Webcam
short_description: Logitech Brio 500 — RightLight 4 auto-framing, 1080p, privacy shutter and Show Mode for product demos.
description:
Brio 500 is Logitech's AI-framing 1080p webcam. Show Mode tilts the camera downward to display hands and desk objects — useful for product demonstrations, unboxings, and online teaching. The built-in privacy shutter covers the lens when not in use, visible as a red indicator to ensure you're never accidentally broadcasting.
- Resolution: 1080p 30fps
- RightLight: 4 (AI-powered auto exposure)
- Show Mode: Yes (angled down for desk/hand demos)
- Privacy: Physical shutter (red indicator)
- Certifications: Teams, Zoom, Google Meet

name: Canon PIXMA TS8370 All-in-One Inkjet Printer
short_description: Canon PIXMA TS8370 — 6-colour Lucia system with photo lab quality prints, wireless and borderless up to A4.
description:
PIXMA TS8370 uses Canon's 6-colour Lucia dye ink system to produce photo prints with 4800×1200 dpi that rival professional photo labs. The dedicated grey ink reduces metallic colour casts in black-and-white prints. CD/DVD disc printing support is built-in — useful for creating custom discs for presentations or media archives.
- Print Resolution: 4800×1200 dpi
- Ink System: 6-colour Lucia (C, M, Y, Black, Grey, Photo Black)
- Borderless: Yes (up to A4)
- Functions: Print, Copy, Scan (all-in-one)
- Connectivity: Wi-Fi, USB, Bluetooth (for mobile)
- Special: CD/DVD disc printing
- Mobile: AirPrint, Google Cloud Print

name: Epson EcoTank ET-4850 All-in-One Ink Tank
short_description: Epson EcoTank ET-4850 — refillable ink tanks for up to 2 years of printing without new cartridges.
description:
EcoTank ET-4850 eliminates expensive cartridge replacements with refillable ink tanks. Each set of bottles included in the box contains enough ink for approximately 7,500 black pages and 5,500 colour pages — roughly 2 years of typical home office use. The per-page cost drops to pennies versus cartridge-based printers.
- Print System: EcoTank refillable ink tanks
- Ink Included: ~7,500 black / ~5,500 colour pages per bottle set
- Functions: Print, Copy, Scan, Fax (all-in-one)
- ADF: 30-sheet auto document feeder
- Connectivity: Wi-Fi, Wi-Fi Direct, USB, Ethernet
- Mobile: AirPrint, Google Cloud Print, Epson Connect

name: Canon PIXMA MG3620 Wireless All-in-One
short_description: Canon PIXMA MG3620 — budget wireless inkjet for basic home printing with AirPrint and Google Cloud Print.
description:
PIXMA MG3620 is the practical choice for households that print occasionally — documents, shipping labels, and occasional photos. Auto-duplex printing saves paper for multi-page documents, and wireless printing from phone or laptop works without installing drivers via AirPrint or Google Cloud Print.
- Print Resolution: 4800×1200 dpi
- Functions: Print, Copy, Scan
- Duplex: Auto duplex print
- Connectivity: Wi-Fi, USB
- Mobile: AirPrint, Google Cloud Print

name: Epson WorkForce WF-7840 Wide-Format All-in-One
short_description: Epson WorkForce WF-7840 — A3+ wide-format inkjet with ADF, fax and fast duplex printing.
description:
WF-7840 handles wide-format printing up to A3+ (13×19 inches) for architects, photographers, and small businesses needing oversized prints. The 35-sheet auto document feeder enables unattended multi-page copying and scanning of contracts and reports. Prints professional quality photo prints up to 13×19 inches without borders.
- Max Print Width: A3+ (13×19 inches)
- Functions: Print, Copy, Scan, Fax
- ADF: 35-sheet auto document feeder
- Duplex: Auto duplex (all functions)
- Connectivity: Wi-Fi, Ethernet, USB

name: Canon MAXIFY GX6020 MegaTank Business Printer
short_description: Canon MAXIFY GX6020 — megatank refillable ink, 6000 black/14000 colour pages, business inkjet speed.
description:
MAXIFY GX6020 is Canon's business-focused megatank printer, printing at 24ipm in black — significantly faster than consumer inkjets. The pigment-based inks produce sharp, water-resistant text ideal for contracts, invoices, and business documents. Each refill bottle set produces up to 6,000 black and 14,000 colour pages.
- Print Speed: 24 ipm (black) / 15.5 ipm (colour)
- Ink System: MegaTank refillable (pigment)
- Yield: ~6,000 black / ~14,000 colour pages per refill
- Functions: Print, Copy, Scan
- ADF: 50-sheet ADF
- Connectivity: Wi-Fi, USB, Ethernet

name: Epson SureColor P700 13" Photo Printer
short_description: Epson SureColor P700 13" — 10-colour UltraChrome Pro10 pigment ink for museum-quality photo prints.
description:
SureColor P700 is a professional photo printer for photographers, fine art printers, and print studios. The 10-colour UltraChrome Pro10 pigment ink set includes Violet and Green for a wider gamut than standard CMYK printers can achieve — covering 99% of the Pantone colour space. Prints archival-quality photos rated to 200+ years of display life.
- Max Print Width: 13 inches
- Ink System: 10-colour UltraChrome Pro10 pigment
- Print Quality: 5760×1440 dpi
- Media: Fine art media, canvas, metallic, CD/DVD
- Connectivity: USB, Wi-Fi, Ethernet
- Archival Life: 200+ years (display life)

name: HP LaserJet Pro M404dn Monochrome Printer
short_description: HP LaserJet Pro M404dn — 40ppm monochrome laser, auto duplex, Ethernet and 250-sheet tray for offices.
description:
LaserJet Pro M404dn is the workhorse of small office laser printing — 40 pages per minute, automatic duplex, and an Ethernet port for shared network access. HP's JetIntelligence toner cartridges include a chip that enables precise toner-level monitoring and genuine HP authentication. First-page-out time of 5.4 seconds keeps productivity high.
- Technology: Monochrome laser
- Print Speed: 40 ppm
- First Page: 5.4 seconds
- Duplex: Automatic
- Paper Tray: 250 sheets
- Connectivity: USB, Ethernet
- Monthly Duty Cycle: Up to 80,000 pages

name: Brother HL-L8360CDW Colour Laser Printer
short_description: Brother HL-L8360CDW — 33ppm colour laser, duplex, wireless and 250-sheet tray for small business colour printing.
description:
HL-L8360CDW delivers sharp colour laser output for presentations, marketing materials, and reports at 33 pages per minute. Brother's high-yield replacement toners reduce per-page costs significantly versus entry-level colour lasers. Mobile printing via AirPrint, Google Cloud Print, and Brother's iPrint&Scan app provides wireless convenience.
- Technology: Colour laser
- Print Speed: 33 ppm (colour and mono)
- Print Quality: 2400×600 dpi
- Duplex: Automatic
- Paper Tray: 250 sheets
- Connectivity: Wi-Fi, USB, Ethernet
- Mobile: AirPrint, Google Cloud Print

name: HP LaserJet MFP M236sdw All-in-One Laser
short_description: HP LaserJet MFP M236sdw — compact monochrome laser all-in-one with wireless, duplex and flatbed scanner.
description:
LaserJet MFP M236sdw is HP's compact laser all-in-one for home offices and small teams. The flatbed scanner copies and scans documents at 1200dpi, while auto duplex printing reduces paper consumption for multi-page documents. HP Instant Ink subscription compatibility enables predictable monthly supply costs.
- Functions: Print, Copy, Scan
- Technology: Monochrome laser
- Print Speed: 20 ppm
- Duplex: Automatic
- Scan Resolution: Up to 1200 dpi
- Connectivity: Wi-Fi, USB

name: Brother MFC-L8900CDW Colour Laser All-in-One
short_description: Brother MFC-L8900CDW — colour laser all-in-one with 50-sheet ADF, fax and NFC tap-to-print.
description:
MFC-L8900CDW is Brother's premium colour laser all-in-one for medium-sized offices. The 50-sheet auto document feeder handles contracts, tax returns, and reports hands-free. NFC tap-to-print lets compatible phones print by touching the printer's NFC tag — no app or pairing setup required.
- Functions: Print, Copy, Scan, Fax
- Speed: 33 ppm colour + mono
- ADF: 50-sheet auto document feeder
- Duplex: Automatic (all functions)
- NFC: Tap-to-print
- Connectivity: Wi-Fi, USB, Ethernet, NFC

name: HP LaserJet Enterprise M507dn High-Volume
short_description: HP LaserJet Enterprise M507dn — 45ppm, 250K monthly duty cycle and HP Security features for enterprise printing.
description:
LaserJet Enterprise M507dn is designed for high-volume enterprise environments — up to 250,000 pages per month duty cycle with enterprise security features including McAfee Embedded Control and HP Sure Start to prevent firmware tampering. The standard 550-sheet tray reduces refill interruptions in busy environments.
- Speed: 45 ppm
- Monthly Duty Cycle: 250,000 pages
- Paper Capacity: 550-sheet main tray
- Security: McAfee Embedded Control, HP Sure Start
- Connectivity: USB, Gigabit Ethernet

name: Brother HL-L3270CDW Compact Colour Laser
short_description: Brother HL-L3270CDW — compact wireless colour laser with 25ppm speed and wireless direct printing.
description:
HL-L3270CDW is Brother's most compact wireless colour laser, suitable for small offices with limited counter space. Wireless Direct printing lets you connect smartphones and tablets to the printer's own Wi-Fi network without a separate router — useful for presentations in meeting rooms without IT access.
- Speed: 25 ppm (colour and mono)
- Duplex: Automatic
- Wireless Direct: Yes (printer as hotspot)
- Connectivity: Wi-Fi, USB, Ethernet
- Mobile: AirPrint, Google Cloud Print

name: CalDigit TS4 Thunderbolt 4 Dock
short_description: CalDigit TS4 — 18 ports including 2× Thunderbolt 4 downstream, 98W host charging and 2× 2.5G Ethernet.
description:
TS4 is widely considered the best Thunderbolt 4 dock for Mac and Windows. 18 ports include dual 2.5G Ethernet ports for separate networks (wired LAN + NAS backup), 2 downstream Thunderbolt 4 ports for daisy-chaining monitors and devices, and 98W host charging for 14" or 16" MacBook Pro. A single Thunderbolt 4 cable replaces 18 individual connections.
- Host: 1× Thunderbolt 4 (upstream, 98W charging)
- Downstream TB4: 2× Thunderbolt 4 (40Gbps)
- USB-A: 5× USB-A 3.2 Gen 2 (10Gbps)
- Ethernet: 2× 2.5G RJ45
- Display: 2× DisplayPort 1.4, 1× DisplayPort 1.2
- Audio: 3.5mm combo jack
- Total Ports: 18

name: Anker 777 Thunderbolt 4 Dock (13-in-1)
short_description: Anker 777 Thunderbolt 4 Dock — 13 ports, 90W charging, 4K 60Hz dual display for MacBook and Windows.
description:
Anker 777 is the value Thunderbolt 4 dock for users who want maximum connectivity without paying CalDigit prices. 13 ports include 2× 10Gbps USB-A, 2× Thunderbolt 4 downstream, HDMI 2.1, and 90W host charging. Solid aluminium build matches MacBook aesthetic, and the vertical stand orientation saves desk space.
- Host: 1× Thunderbolt 4 (upstream, 90W charging)
- Downstream TB4: 1× Thunderbolt 4 downstream
- USB-A: 4× USB-A 3.2
- Ethernet: 1× Gigabit
- Display: 1× HDMI 2.1 + 1× DP via TB4
- Total Ports: 13

name: Dell WD22TB4 Thunderbolt 4 Dock
short_description: Dell WD22TB4 — official Dell Thunderbolt 4 dock with 130W charging for Dell XPS and Precision laptops.
description:
WD22TB4 is Dell's official Thunderbolt 4 docking solution, certified for Dell XPS, Inspiron, and Precision laptops with 130W host charging — enough for the most power-hungry Dell laptops. Dell Peripheral Manager software manages connected peripherals and updates dock firmware automatically.
- Host: 1× Thunderbolt 4 (130W charging)
- USB-A: 4× USB-A 3.2
- USB-C: 1× USB-C 3.2
- Ethernet: 1× 2.5G
- Display: 2× DisplayPort 1.4
- Audio: 3.5mm combo
- Max Displays: 3× 4K 60Hz

name: Belkin Connect Pro 12-in-1 USB-C Hub
short_description: Belkin 12-in-1 USB-C hub — 100W PD passthrough, HDMI 4K, Ethernet and 7 data ports in one slim unit.
description:
Belkin Connect Pro 12-in-1 is the portable dock for travellers — light enough to pack alongside a laptop, with enough ports to replace the laptop bag full of individual adapters. 100W PD passthrough charges most laptops at full speed while the hub is in use. HDMI 4K 30Hz and USB-C 4K 60Hz provide dual external display connectivity.
- USB-C PD: 100W host passthrough
- Display: 1× HDMI 4K 30Hz + 1× USB-C 4K 60Hz
- USB-A: 4× USB-A 3.2 Gen 1
- Ethernet: 1× Gigabit
- Card Reader: SD + microSD
- Connection: USB-C (cable attached)

name: Anker 552 USB-C Hub (9-in-1)
short_description: Anker 9-in-1 USB-C Hub — 4K 60Hz HDMI, 85W PD passthrough and SD card reader for everyday portability.
description:
Anker 552 is the practical everyday USB-C hub for MacBook and iPad Pro users who need more ports without the expense of a Thunderbolt dock. 4K 60Hz HDMI connects a single 4K monitor, 85W PD passthrough charges the laptop, and the compact form factor attaches cleanly to the side of the MacBook.
- USB-C PD: 85W passthrough
- Display: 1× HDMI 4K 60Hz
- USB-A: 2× USB-A 3.0
- USB-C: 2× USB-C data (5Gbps)
- Card Reader: SD + microSD

name: Bellroy Classic Backpack Compact (20L)
short_description: Bellroy Classic Backpack Compact — premium woven recycled fabric, fits 16" laptop and carry-on friendly.
description:
Bellroy Classic Backpack Compact is designed for people who commute daily and travel frequently. The 20L volume is perfectly sized for an overhead locker or under-seat storage, while the internal organisation provides dedicated slots for a laptop (up to 16"), tablet, chargers, and documents without needing to unpack at security.
- Capacity: 20L
- Laptop: Up to 16" (padded sleeve)
- Material: Recycled woven twill (water resistant)
- Carry-on: Airline compliant size
- Organisation: Laptop sleeve, tablet pocket, accessory pockets

name: Targus CitySmart 15.6" Laptop Backpack
short_description: Targus CitySmart 15.6" — adjustable dividers, USB-A charging port and trolley sleeve for business travel.
description:
CitySmart is the versatile business backpack for commuters and travellers. The Air Protect system uses a floating suspended panel to keep the laptop isolated from the bag frame during impacts. A pass-through trolley sleeve slides over upright luggage handles for hands-free airport navigation.
- Laptop: Up to 15.6"
- Capacity: 22L
- External USB-A: Yes (connect powerbank inside)
- Trolley: Luggage pass-through strap
- Protection: Air Protect system

name: Incase ICON Pack 15" MacBook Backpack
short_description: Incase ICON Pack — Apple exclusive design, fleece-lined 15" MacBook slot and CabLock organiser.
description:
ICON Pack is designed specifically for MacBook users — the fleece-lined dedicated sleeve holds 15" MacBook Pro snugly without a zipper to scratch the lid. CabLock side loops anchor cables while ports are in use, and the luggage pass-through strap attaches to rolling luggage handle. Available in a colour palette that matches MacBook finishes.
- Laptop: 15" MacBook (fleece-lined sleeve)
- CabLock: Cable management loops
- Trolley: Luggage pass-through
- Material: Recycled polyester

name: Waterfield Designs CitySlicker 14" Laptop Sleeve
short_description: Waterfield CitySlicker 14" sleeve — hand-crafted US leather and neoprene with magnetic closure.
description:
CitySlicker is hand-made in San Francisco using full-grain leather exterior and neoprene interior. The magnetic closure allows one-handed opening and closing while walking. A second neoprene-lined compartment stores chargers and cables alongside the laptop. Custom monogramming available at checkout.
- Laptop: 13–14" (laptop only, no handle)
- Material: Full-grain leather + neoprene
- Closure: Magnetic snap
- Made in: San Francisco, USA
- Custom: Monogramming available

name: Knomo Beauchamp 15.6" Laptop Briefcase
short_description: Knomo Beauchamp 15.6" — water-resistant PU exterior with RFID blocking passport pocket and detachable strap.
description:
Beauchamp combines briefcase professionalism with modern practicality. The RFID-blocking passport and card holder protects contactless payment cards in busy public transit, while the quick-access front pocket holds phone and keys. Detachable shoulder strap converts between briefcase and messenger carry styles.
- Laptop: Up to 15.6" (padded sleeve)
- RFID: Blocking card holder built-in
- Carry: Top handle + detachable shoulder strap
- Material: Water-resistant PU leather
- Trolley: Luggage pass-through

name: Ergotron LX Monitor Arm (Single)
short_description: Ergotron LX Monitor Arm — height, tilt, swivel and rotation in 6 axes, holds monitors up to 25kg.
description:
Ergotron LX is the benchmark for monitor arms, offering frictionless positioning in every axis — height, depth, tilt, pan, and portrait/landscape rotation. The Constant Force mechanism means the monitor stays exactly where you place it without drift, and frees up the entire footprint of a traditional monitor stand for cable management and desk space.
- VESA: 75×75 and 100×100mm
- Weight Capacity: 3.2–11.3 kg (7–25 lbs)
- Adjustment: Height, depth, tilt ±90°, pan 360°
- Reach: 25-inch extension from post
- Clamp: Desk clamp (up to 76mm thick)

name: Logitech MX Desk Mat Extended (Extended)
short_description: Logitech MX Extended Desk Mat — 900×400mm premium micro-textured surface for keyboard and mouse.
description:
MX Desk Mat uses a micro-textured surface tuned for Logitech's high-DPI mouse sensors while also providing a comfortable typing surface for keyboards. The 900×400mm extended format covers keyboard, mouse, and space for a water bottle or coffee cup. Non-slip rubber base prevents the mat from shifting during use.
- Dimensions: 900 × 400 × 2mm
- Surface: Micro-textured polyester blend
- Tracking: Compatible with all Logitech optical sensors
- Base: Non-slip rubber
- Edge: Stitched anti-fray edging

name: Anker 675 USB-C Docking Station (Magnetic Desktop)
